_readme: This file contains all email content for Pookie Wishes. Variables are wrapped in {{double_braces}}. Load this in EmailJS template builder.

1_user_acknowledgement._when: Sent to customer immediately after they submit order + payment screenshot
1_user_acknowledgement.subject: We've received your order! Your surprise is on its way рџ’– вЂ” {{order_id}}

2_admin_verify._when: Sent to admin immediately after customer submits
2_admin_verify.subject: [NEW ORDER] Verify Payment вЂ” {{order_id}} вЂ” {{total_amount}}

3_google_form_link._when: Sent to customer after you reply DONE to the verification email
3_google_form_link._trigger: Admin replies DONE to email_2 в†’ EmailJS sends this
3_google_form_link.subject: Payment Confirmed! Now let's make it personal рџЋЁ вЂ” {{order_id}}
3_google_form_link.body:
Hi {{buyer_name}}! рџЋ‰

Great news вЂ” your payment has been verified! We're ready to start building your surprise for {{bday_person_name}}. рџ’–

Now we need a few personal touches from you to make it truly unforgettable.

рџ“‹ PERSONALISATION FORM:
{{google_form_link}}

в”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓ
HOW TO FILL IT
в”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓ

1. OPEN the form link above

2. YOUR ORDER ID is: {{order_id}}
   (Enter this in the first field so we can match it to your order)

3. WISH MESSAGE вЂ” Write a heartfelt message. This will appear inside the website. Make it as long or short as you like!

4. PHOTOS вЂ” Upload up to 3 photos:
   вЂў Photos of you and the birthday person
   вЂў Solo photos of them
   вЂў A mix of both вЂ” whatever feels right!
   Tip: Make sure photos are clear and good quality.

5. SPECIAL REQUESTS вЂ” Mention anything specific you'd like included, changed, or personalised.

6. SUBMIT the form.

вЏі Once you submit, our zero-touch automation will build and deliver your final website link within 5 minutes!

Need help? WhatsApp us at +91 9569318598 вЂ” we're happy to assist!

With love and excitement,
The Pookie Wishes Team вњЁ
https://pookie-wishes.vercel.app

4_admin_form_submitted._when: Sent to admin when customer submits the Google Form
4_admin_form_submitted._trigger: Google Form submit в†’ Google Sheet update в†’ Apps Script / Zapier sends this email
4_admin_form_submitted.subject: [ACTION] Customer Form Submitted вЂ” {{order_id}} вЂ” Start Building Your Magic!
4_admin_form_submitted.body:
A customer has submitted their personalisation form! The ZERO-TOUCH automation is now processing their surprise.

в”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓ
ORDER
в”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓ
Order ID:   {{order_id}}
Design:     {{template_name}}
Customer:   {{buyer_name}} ({{buyer_email}})

в”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓ
WHAT THEY SUBMITTED
в”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓ
Wish Message:
{{wish_message}}

Photos: (Check Google Sheet for uploaded files)
{{google_sheet_link}}

Special Requests:
{{special_requests}}

в”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓ
AUTOMATION STATUS
в”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓ
The system is generating the final link. You don't need to do anything! 
Once generated, the delivery email will be sent to the customer automatically.

Admin Panel: https://pookie-wishes.vercel.app/admin/

5_delivery._when: Sent to customer when you reply with LINK to email_4
5_delivery._trigger: Admin replies with LINK в†’ EmailJS sends this to customer
5_delivery.subject: Your Surprise is Ready! рџЋЃвњЁ вЂ” {{order_id}}
5_delivery.body:
Hi {{buyer_name}}! рџЋ‰рџЋ‚

We're absolutely thrilled to deliver your personalised surprise for {{bday_person_name}}! We've poured so much love into making it special.

рџ”— YOUR WEBSITE LINK:
{{website_link}}

в”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓ
HOW TO SHARE IT
в”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓ
вЂў Copy the link and send it via WhatsApp, Instagram DM, or SMS
вЂў Share it on their special day вЂ” timing is everything! рџЋЉ

рџ’Ў TIP: The website works best on mobile. Ask them to open it somewhere private so they can experience the full surprise!

в”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓ
YOUR ORDER
в”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓ
Order ID:   {{order_id}}
Design:     {{template_name}}
For:        {{bday_person_name}}

в”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓ
We'd love to see their reaction! Tag us @pookiewishes on Instagram рџ’–

Thank you for choosing Pookie Wishes. Hope this makes their moment truly unforgettable! рџЊё

With so much love,
The Pookie Wishes Team вњЁ

variables_reference.template_name: e.g. Hello Kitty рџЋЂ or Harry Potter вљЎ
variables_reference.bday_person_name: From checkout form вЂ” who the website is for
variables_reference.bday_date: From checkout form вЂ” their birthday date
variables_reference.needed_by: From checkout form вЂ” when they need it by
variables_reference.screenshot_url: Firebase Storage URL of payment screenshot
variables_reference.google_form_link: Your Google Form URL from site.json
variables_reference.website_link: URL you provide in admin panel after building
